title: Diamond Ingots
description: The harder way to obtain diamonds!
body:
### Diamond Ingots ``` This mod aims to slow down how fast you can progress through the post-stone stage of the game by changing how diamond mining works, and also making late-game diamond mining more rewarding. ```
Diamond Ingots showcase video

Create an issue on my **GitHub** if you want me to add support for mods that have custom ore types. | Gameplay Features | Supported Mods | | --- | --- | |
Diamond mining is now a delicate process
Because now you have to worry about
Your diamonds breaking into shards!

| [**Farmer's Delight**](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) [Forge](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) [Fabric](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-fabric) | |
All diamond crafting recipes are converted
To use the new diamond types.

| [**ExtraSounds**](https://modrinth.com/mod/extrasounds) | |
Normal diamonds are obtained from structure
Loot-tables or by smelting diamond ingots.

| --- | |
Normal diamonds can be broken
Down into one diamond shard

| --- |
